ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the course (e.g., SV1, None) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period during which the course is offered (e.g., Full Year, Semester 1) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "learning_outcomes" TEXT /* Learning outcomes for the course */,
  "assessment_methods" TEXT /* Assessment methods for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_period FOREIGN KEY ("period") REFERENCES course_periods ("period_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_availability FOREIGN KEY ("availability") REFERENCES course_availability ("availability_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability status */,
  "availability_code" TEXT /* Code representing the availability status (e.g., SV1, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the availability status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the availability status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the availability status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., Full Year, Semester 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_co_requisites" (
  "co_requisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-requisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course requiring a co-requisite */,
  "co_requisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-requisite course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the co-requisite relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the co-requisite relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_requisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_co_requisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_co_requisites_co_requisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_requisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_cross_listings" (
  "cross_listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-listing relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course with a cross-listing */,
  "cross_listing_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cross-listed course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cross-listing relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cross-listing relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cross_listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_cross_listings_cross_listing_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("cross_listing_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_cross_listings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offering_periods" (
  "course_offering_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering period */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year during which the course is offered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course offering period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course offering period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_offering_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offering_periods_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES course_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offering_periods_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment_limits" (
  "enrollment_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment limit */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Enrollment limit for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment limit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment limit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_limits_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the waitlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the waitlist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_waitlists_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_waitlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_course_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "preference_order" INTEGER /* Order of preference for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_course_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_course_preferences_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
